# QA Plan: Sprint 38 — Polish Phase 3: Art-Bible / Evidence / Hygiene Wrap + C2 Polish + Gate Prep
**Date**: 2026-08-03  
**Generated by**: /qa-plan sprint  
**Scope**: 11 stories across polish phase 3 (art-bible sign-off, evidence refresh, tests/unit+integration layout hygiene, C2/Platform Editor residuals, perf re-profile, playtest 10, dispatching QA integration, closeout) per sprint plan  
**Engine**: Unity 6.3 LTS (C# / .NET 8 headless; PlayMode for Unity adapter + C2 proxies in ProjectAegis.Delegation.UnityAdapter.Tests)  
**Sprint File**: production/sprints/sprint-38-polish-phase-3-art-bible-evidence-hygiene-wrap.md  
**Trunk**: main @ (post-S37 commit; TBD after S37 closeout)  
**Sprint Dates**: 2026-08-03 to 2026-08-16  
**Review mode**: **Lean** (production/review-mode.txt — PR-SPRINT skipped; parallel domain agents)  
**Authority**: polish-scope-boundary-2026-06-19.md (Phase 3 continuation) + S37  

**Scope Compliance Note (enforced):** Strictly inside polish-scope-boundary-2026-06-19.md + S37 precedent (Baltic + C2 18/18 + Platform Editor C–H polish + replay + P0/P1 perf only; no globe, no badges, no DOTS, extend-only CatalogWriteGate, ZERO DelegationBridge.cs, production Baltic hash immutable `17144800277401907079`, headless primary, lean evidence). Every story must cite polish-scope-boundary-2026-06-19.md + S37. S38-02 (this plan) blocks all feature waves. Test baseline ≥1215 day-1; closeout target ≥1215 (no regression; post-S37). Maintain all determinism/replay/C2/proxy gates; prepare for gate-check or S39.

**Classification note (per Phase 3):** All types inferred from ACs (no `Type:` in sprint plan). Baseline/closeout/dispatching/hygiene = Integration (cross-system gates, replay, GitNexus, proxy). QA plan / art-bible / tests layout / perf-reprofile / further ux = Config/Data (docs, verdicts, CI reports, appendix updates). C2+Platform polish = UI primary (mixed with Logic for filters/projections; conservative to Integration on proxy boundary). Live PNG evidence = UI/Visual/Feel. Playtest = UI. Perf follow-up = Logic (hash/replay). Mixed risk resolved to primary (UI for surfacing polish per S37 precedent; Integration conservative on gates/cross-boundary). All within polish-boundary (art-bible, evidence, hygiene, C2/Platform residuals + perf/playtest only). No new features.

## Smoke Test Scope

Critical paths to verify before any QA hand-off for this sprint (lean mode; headless-first; preserve gates):

1. Game launches to main menu without crash
2. New game / new session can be started (Baltic fixture)
3. Full-solution re-baseline gate (≥1215 PASS; GitNexus indexed; smoke doc produced)
4. ReplayGolden 6/6 suite PASS (no divergence on engage/classify/stale/readiness/spoof/replay)
5. C2 headless proxy ≥18/18+ (extended filters for residual polish + Graph*; PlayModeSmoke|C2Selection|...|Graph* etc.; 18/18+ maintained)
6. AD-ART-BIBLE verdict / sign-off facilitation artifact present in design/art/art-bible.md (lean)
7. tests/unit + integration layout hygiene + CI verify PASS on ≥1215 baseline (hybrid retained; no breakage)
8. Live Editor PNG evidence refresh (or lean PASS WITH NOTES) aligned to C2/Platform polish
9. Sim/Perf re-profile delta clean vs S37; no regression in perf-profile-polish-baseline-2026-06-19.md
10. Production Baltic hash `17144800277401907079` unchanged (immutable)
11. ZERO diff on `DelegationBridge.cs`; CatalogWriteGate extend-only only
12. Performance within budget: sustained C2 frame headroom vs 16.67 ms; no new spikes from polish work; hash-identical for any perf follow-up
13. Dispatching QA integration examples validated in kickoff + coordination-map (S38-10 refinements complete; examples + team-qa notes present)
14. Smoke check passes (run `/smoke-check sprint` before QA hand-off); all waves green before closeout S38-06
15. No regressions introduced on S37 deliverables (graph surfacing, C2/Platform polish, frame, proxies, determinism)

*Smoke tests verified by developer via `/smoke-check`. All merges must preserve ReplayGolden + C2 proxy + Baltic pin + polish-boundary + lean mode. Art-bible / evidence / hygiene / C2 polish only — no out-of-scope. Reference this list when running that skill.*

| S38-04 / S38-07 / S38-08 (C2/Platform polish + evidence + perf) | Confirm polish does not degrade information density, responsiveness, frame, or introduce visual/selection issues (advisory as part of S38-09) | Advisory | Experienced |

**Sign-off requirement**: Playtest notes must be written to `production/playtests/playtest-*-s38-*.md` (or `production/session-logs/`) and reviewed by qa-lead / designer before the story can be marked COMPLETE. Per lean polish mode.

If no stories require playtest validation: *S38-09 is explicitly scheduled; graph/C2/Polish focus per sprint plan + S37 carry.*

---

## Definition of Done — This Sprint

A story is DONE when ALL of the following are true:

- [ ] All acceptance criteria verified — via automated test result OR documented manual evidence (screenshot, video, or playtest notes with sign-off)
- [ ] Test file exists at the specified path for all Logic and Integration stories (replay gates, proxy extensions, hash-identical, CI harness, etc.)
- [ ] Manual evidence document exists for all Visual/Feel and UI stories (PNGs, frame docs, viewer screenshots, playtest report, perf appendix, verdict, updated docs)
- [ ] Smoke check passes (run `/smoke-check sprint` before QA hand-off) — replay 6/6, C2 ≥18/18+ (Graph* incl.), re-baseline ≥1215, art-bible verdict, hygiene CI, no regression
- [ ] No regressions introduced (Baltic hash immutable, DelegationBridge untouched, existing filters/goldens/proxies, frame budget, determinism, S37 deliverables)
- [ ] Code reviewed (via `/code-review` or documented peer review)
- [ ] Story file updated to `Status: Complete` (via `/story-done`)
- [ ] Parallel track closeout (S38-06) confirms all waves green
- [ ] Polish-boundary compliance: every deliverable cites `polish-scope-boundary-2026-06-19.md` + S37; lean mode observed; no scope creep (no globe, no badges, no DOTS, extend-only, ZERO DelegationBridge)
- [ ] Test baseline preserved ≥1215 at closeout

**Sprint gates (from plan)**: All Must Have; QA plan (S38-02) merged **before** waves; smoke; replay 6/6; C2 proxy ≥18/18+ + frame headroom; AD-ART-BIBLE sign-off facilitated (lean); tests layout hygiene advanced + CI verified; live evidence or lean notes; perf re-profile delta; playtest 10 if capacity; test baseline ≥1215; no S1/S2 bugs. Authority: polish-scope-boundary-2026-06-19.md (Phase 3) + lean mode + S37.

This QA plan fulfills team-qa Phase 3 (test plan) requirements in full (scope, story classification table per Phase 2, automated/manual reqs, entry/exit criteria incl. smoke UNKNOWN handling as PASS WITH WARNINGS, out-of-scope explicit, DoD). (Appended during /team-qa execution.)

*Follows qa-plan skill exactly. Adapted from S37 qa-plan structure to S38 stories/tasks, polish-boundary, lean mode, and 11-story scope. Enforced: headless primary, C2 18/18+ (Graph* extended), replay 6/6, Baltic immutable, ZERO DelegationBridge, extend-only, no scope creep.*
